description: Create a fabrication drawing for a 19-inch 1U rack panel in LibreCAD using millimeters. Draw a 482.6mm x 43.7mm rectangle with the bottom-left at (0,0) on a layer named 'PANEL_OUTLINE' (White/7). On a layer named 'CUTOUTS' (Cyan/4), include two 6.0mm diameter mounting holes centered at (8.75, 21.85) and (473.85, 21.85), a 40mm x 40mm square fan cutout centered at (241.3, 21.85), and a 20mm diameter power connector circle centered at (400.0, 21.85). On a layer named 'NOTES' (Yellow/2), add the text '1U FAN PLATE' with a height of 5mm at approximately (50, 20). Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/rack_panel.dxf.
